description: The Material Review Board (MRB) is meeting to decide the disposition for a batch of non-conforming parts.

nodes.task_description: Review the details of the Non-Conformance Report (NCR), including the defect description and quantity.

expected_outcome.value: MRB team reviews the NCR information.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the potential impact of the defect and decide on a disposition (e.g., 'Scrap', 'Rework', 'Use-As-Is').

expected_outcome.value: The team decides the parts can be reworked to bring them into specification.

nodes.task_description: Record the disposition in the NCR, provide instructions for the rework, and close the report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the NCR with the 'Rework' disposition and adds a link to the rework instructions.
